task_completion.description: Agent captured and saved before_correction.png showing the initial cross-section with measurements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of Blue Sky Plan export, an image viewer, or file explorer showing 'before_correction.png' containing a dental cross-section with an implant and measurement lines (ruler tool) checking nerve distance and bone walls.

task_completion.description: Agent created qa_report.txt documenting the original measurements, identified violations, and planned corrections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a text editor (e.g., Notepad) displaying 'qa_report.txt' with recorded values for nerve clearance, buccal wall, and lingual wall, explicitly noting the safety violations.

task_completion.description: Agent adjusted the implant position and angulation in Blue Sky Plan to correct the safety violations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blue Sky Plan interface showing active manipulation of the implant in the cross-sectional or 3D view, moving it coronally (away from the nerve) and adjusting its tilt/centering to ensure adequate bone on both buccal and lingual sides.

task_completion.description: Agent captured and saved after_correction.png showing the corrected cross-section with updated measurements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of 'after_correction.png' being saved or viewed, showing the newly positioned implant with updated measurement lines confirming >= 2.0mm nerve clearance and >= 1.0mm bone walls.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the corrected project file as reviewed_plan.bsp in the required directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blue Sky Plan 'Save Project As' dialog or Windows File Explorer showing 'reviewed_plan.bsp' saved in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\QAReview\.

integrity.description: Agent actually used the Blue Sky Plan GUI to measure and adjust the implant.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Blue Sky Plan 5 interface with the cross-section view, implant adjustment handles, and measurement tools actively being used, rather than just generating text files.

integrity.description: Measurements in the report correspond to visual evidence in the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers typed into qa_report.txt should match the measurement annotations visible in the Blue Sky Plan cross-section screenshots.

integrity.description: All required files are saved in the specified QAReview directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths in save dialogs, text editors, or file explorer windows must clearly show C:\Users\Docker\Documents\QAReview\.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Tooth #30 is the lower right first molar. Safety criteria: >= 2.0 mm nerve clearance, >= 1.0 mm buccal/lingual bone walls, no cortical plate perforation. The initial state has deliberate violations: apex 1.2-1.5 mm from IAN, off-center toward buccal, and lingual tilt. The agent must correct these in Blue Sky Plan and save before_correction.png, after_correction.png, qa_report.txt, and reviewed_plan.bsp to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\QAReview\.
